title: vitex agnus-castus var. trifolia
intro: Vitex agnus-castus var. trifolia is a lesser-known variety of the chasteberry plant, also known as Vitex agnus-castus, which is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Vitex agnus-castus var. trifolia include its potential to regulate menstrual cycles, alleviate symptoms of menopause, and support the immune system, as well as its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. This plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
